description_long: This is a cylindrical plastic bottle with a blue screw-on cap, designed to contain and dispense lotion or foam. The bottle features a prominent label with a black, blue, and white color scheme, including the brand name 'Skink' and the product name 'Antibacterial Foam' in bold, stylized fonts. The front label is decorated with splatter graphics and a dynamic, urban-inspired design, while the back label contains detailed product information and instructions in smaller text. The bottle's body is primarily white with a large blue section on the lower half, and the cap is a solid blue color. The overall appearance is clean and professional, suitable for personal care use in urban environments. The bottle is likely made of lightweight plastic and is designed to be easily portable and resealable.
description: A cylindrical white and blue plastic bottle with a blue screw-on cap and urban-styled label graphics. The label features the brand 'Skink' and the product 'Antibacterial Foam'.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with 'Skink' branding and 'Antibacterial Foam' product name, along with decorative splatter graphics.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the transition from the front label to the back, with visible product information text and a mostly blue and white color scheme.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying detailed product information, instructions, and additional branding elements in small text.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the edge of the main label, barcode, and a partial view of the back label's text.
